visualization.requirement: Bar chart showing primary department vs secondary appointment counts, sorted by secondary affiliation frequency.
visualization.reason: Original heat map impractical due to sparse secondary appointments (5 records). Bar chart better surfaces meaningful interdisciplinary patterns.

interaction.requirement: Removed - insufficient data support from Member_of secondary appointments
interaction.reason: Limited secondary appointments (5 entries) make collaboration frequency analysis statistically insignificant

interaction.requirement: Clicking faculty rank in V2 highlights corresponding proportion in V1 via shared department filter
interaction.reason: Original dynamic filtering unfeasible due to missing rank data in V1 aggregation - revised interaction maintains logical data flow
